markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on a strategy to achieve Brex's 136% lead growth target.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Pivot:** The focus shifts from a traffic-first approach to a lead-quality-first strategy. The goal is to rank in the top 3 for high-intent commercial keywords (e.g., "business credit cards"), as this drives disproportionate lead volume.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [**Priority 1: Tools & Templates:** This new section is the top priority. It will serve as a "playground" for rapid experimentation with programmatic content, designed to capture high-intent users and generate "soft conversions" (e.g., template downloads) for remarketing.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=2885.0)
  - [**Priority 2: Content Hub Redesign:** The `pry.co` domain will be redesigned into a content hub. This is a critical defensive move to prevent its sale post-acquisition and leverage its strong backlinks (e.g., TechCrunch).](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=4001.0)
  - [**Quality Control Overhaul:** GrowthX's editorial process requires a major overhaul. Brex's team is spending too much time editing for AI hallucinations, poor formatting, and keyword cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=4763.0)

## Topics

### The 136% Lead Growth Challenge

  - [**Goal:** Increase organic + LLM leads by 136% by Jan 2027.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [**Initial Proposal (GrowthX):** A portfolio approach to 2-3x traffic by optimizing the entire content surface area, including the underperforming `/journal` and `/resources` sections.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [**Brex's Counter-Strategy:** Focus exclusively on high-intent, commercial keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Top-of-funnel traffic is low-value ("garbage traffic," e.g., college students) and decays quickly. High-intent keywords drive disproportionate lead volume (e.g., top 3 rankings are critical).](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
      - [**Example:** The "vision statement examples" page, despite high traffic, attracts the wrong audience and is a candidate for deprecation.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)

### Priority 1: Tools & Templates Section

  - [**Objective:** Create a new section for programmatic tools and templates.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)
  - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=2885.0)
      - [**"Playground" for Experimentation:** A dedicated space for rapid content creation (20-30 pieces/week) with fewer review cycles to accelerate learnings.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=2902.0)
      - [**Soft Conversions:** Capture users not ready for a demo with free, valuable assets (e.g., expense policy templates), enabling future remarketing.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=2687.0)
  - [**Status:** Jon has existing designs (Figma/Sanity) that could enable a 1-2 week launch.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=2298.0)

### Priority 2: `pry.co` Content Hub

  - [**Objective:** Redesign the `pry.co` domain into a content hub.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=4001.0)
  - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=2885.0)
      - [**Urgency:** The domain is at risk of being sold post-acquisition.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=4510.0)
      - [**Strategic Asset:** Leverage `pry.co`'s strong backlinks (e.g., TechCrunch) to build a powerful content hub that can "rip and replace" competitors like Ramp.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=4043.0)
  - [**Technical Path:** Migrate the 42 pages from its outdated CMS to Sanity, preserving valuable URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=4380.0)

### Content Quality & Process Feedback

  - [**Problem:** GrowthX's content requires significant editing from Brex's team.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=4763.0)
  - [**Specific Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=4763.0)
      - [**AI Hallucinations:** Incorrect information and sources.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=4904.0)
      - [**Poor Sourcing:** Citing the same source repeatedly (e.g., 8 times in one article).](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=5089.0)
      - [**Keyword Cannibalization:** Targeting keywords Brex already ranks for (e.g., position 3), which hurts existing performance.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=5372.0)
      - [**Formatting:** Overuse of "chunking" (short, choppy sentences) despite a directive to stop.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=5274.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** Insufficient and poorly executed.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=5352.0)
  - [**Solution:** A deep-dive session is needed to systematically deconstruct these quality issues and build a robust, scalable editorial process.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=5008.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=4703.0)
      - [Refine prototypes for the unified content experience and Tools & Templates section.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=4703.0)
      - [Schedule a deep-dive session to deconstruct content quality issues.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=5008.0)
      - [Scope the `pry.co` redesign as a potential parallel workstream.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=4356.0)
  - [**Brex:**](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=4729.0)
      - [Provide access to the website repo for Kirkland Gee.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=4729.0)
      - [Locate the existing Figma/Sanity designs for the Resources page.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=2287.0)
      - [Share specific examples of articles with quality issues for the deep-dive session.](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=5008.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=5491.0)
      - [Reschedule the recurring meeting to accommodate Brex's conference travel (Feb 10-13).](https://fathom.video/share/_7v9wf-sUZRtVZqrstCxS4toYYhejtgx?tab=summary&timestamp=5491.0)
